Welcome

Total Garage Works

Total Garage Works has been serving Charlotte and the surrounding region with premium garage door repair services built on a foundation of integrity, craftsmanship, and an unwavering commitment to excellence. Our team brings decades of combined experience to every project, ensuring results that stand the test of time.

Why Choose Us

Why Charlotte Trusts Total Garage Works

  • ✦ Quality Craftsmanship
  • ✦ Specialized Knowledge
  • ✦ Comprehensive Services
  • ✦ Proven Track Record
  • ✦ Family-Owned Commitment
Work With Us →
Affiliations & Certifications
What We Do

Our Services

Garage Door Cable Repair

Garage Door Roller Replacement

Worn-out garage door rollers can cause excessive noise and strain on your garage door opener. Total Garage Works offers ...

Garage Door Panel Replacement

Damaged garage door panels can detract from your home's curb appeal and compromise its security. Total Garage Works prov...

Garage Door Weather Sealing

“
Total Garage Works was fantastic! Our garage door spring broke on a Saturday morning, and they were able to come out within a couple of hours. The technician, Mike, was professional, efficient, and explained everything clearly. Highly recommend!
— Sarah K.
